rationale: All AC items implemented: produce checks max_message_bytes/max_batch_bytes returning MESSAGE_TOO_LARGE (10); transactional requests rejected with INVALID_TXN_STATE (48) when caps.transactions=false; fetch collapses max_wait_ms to 0 when caps.fetch_wait=false; group handlers correctly delegated to coordinator backend. Integration test with 1024-byte cap and 2KB payload asserts the required error.

findings.summary: fetch.rs assigns to `_max_wait_ms` which is unused downstream, so the capability check is inert today — fine since the prior code also ignored max_wait_ms, but worth wiring through once long-poll is implemented.
Group-handler generation check from the bead description is satisfied indirectly via coordinator backend (heartbeat/sync_group); no per-handler change present. Acceptable but undocumented in code.
